name: Valentine Sugar Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, cream together the butter and powdered sugar until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and extracts; stir until well combined.
3. Gradually mix in the flour until the dough is smooth and forms into a ball.
4. Chill the dough for several hours or overnight.
5. On a lightly floured surface, roll out the chilled dough to a thickness of 1/4 inch.
6. Cut with a 2 1/2-inch or 3-inch heart-shaped cookie cutter.
7. Place the cut cookies on ungreased baking sheets.
8. If desired, sprinkle with red decorator sugar.
9. Bake at 375°F (190°C) for 8 to 10 minutes, or until lightly browned.
